audience: Builder who is not the original developer. Heed every risk_notes field.

sourcing_reliability.DigiKey/Mouser: Most reliable for passives, buck, connectors. Authentic parts, traceable. Higher cost.
sourcing_reliability.Amazon: Fast, OK for Pi/enclosure/hub/PIR. Watch for counterfeit RTL-SDR and fake SD cards.
sourcing_reliability.AliExpress: Cheapest, slowest, highest counterfeit risk. Acceptable for non-critical mechanicals; AVOID for RTL-SDR and SD cards.
sourcing_reliability.Vendor-direct: Use rtl-sdr.com (RTL-SDR Blog V3) and LilyGO/Meshtastic vendors for radios.

per_node.risk_notes: Genuine only. 512MB RAM — duty cycle is mandatory or it will OOM under RTL+FFT. Frequent stock shortages; use rpilocator.
Counterfeit cards are common on Amazon/AliExpress — buy from a reputable seller and verify capacity with f3/h2testw before deploy. A2 endurance matters for logging.
MUST be the TCXO RTL-SDR Blog V3. Cheap non-TCXO clones drift and FAIL G2 spectrum sweeps. Buy from rtl-sdr.com to avoid clones. Cannot tune 5.8 GHz (hard limit).
Must be UAC1.0 class (driverless). Some 'gaming' mics need drivers and will not enumerate with arecord. Confirm 16 kHz capable.
OUT pin is 3.3V (safe for GPIO). Set retrigger jumper to H (repeat). Two trim pots (sensitivity/time) need field tuning. Cheap clones vary — buy a few.

CONFIRM SX1262 variant (NOT SX1276) for Meshtastic. Verify correct frequency band for your legal region (868 EU / 915 US). Never power without antenna attached. Comes in CP210x serial — needs udev rule.
Glass reeds are fragile — order spares. Must align with lid magnet so reed is CLOSED when lid shut (else constant tamper HOLD).

7.4V nominal (8.4V full) — MUST go through buck to 5V; direct connection destroys Pi. Prefer a pack with protection circuit. SHIPPING RESTRICTED (air freight rules); source locally where possible. Do not puncture.
Rate >=2.5A continuous. Verify 5.0V at OUT with a meter BEFORE connecting Pi. Cheap modules sag under RTL load and cause brownout reboots. Pololu is reliable.
165x135x85 has 0mm stack margin — if lid won't close, use 150x120x90mm. Needs 2x M16 glands. Hammond 1591XX-class.
Non-critical mechanical. Galvanized for outdoor. Confirm U-bolt fits 50mm OD.
MUST be powered (RTL+mic+radio exceed Pi Zero USB current). Confirm micro-B OTG uplink. Some 'OTG' hubs back-power the Pi incorrectly — test power path.
Include 3A inline fuse holder for LiPo, M3x12 standoffs, M16 glands, 22AWG silicone wire, Dupont jumpers, desiccant packs.

first_order_recommendation.description: ONE node + spares. Prove G1-G3 before buying 3 more.

bench_test_equipment.part: 2.4 GHz source (Wi-Fi AP or phone hotspot)
bench_test_equipment.risk_notes: Must actively transmit data during test.
Required to confirm inbound RX (Mk I RX is manual).

compliance.export_itar: International shipment/sale requires export screening sign-off — see docs/export_screening.md.
compliance.rf_regulatory: Meshtastic LoRa region must match local RF law before powering antennas.
